title: Annual cleanup day at Rose Hill Cemetery
description:
Event date: April 1, 2026
Event Time: 12:00 AM - 11:59 PM
Location:
255 Ash St
Spearfish, SD 57783
Description:
The annual cleanup day at Rose Hill Cemetery is Wednesday, April 1, when cemetery staff will be picking up decorations around the monuments in preparation for the summer. They will collect items that are protruding past the foundation of the monuments, in the ground surrounding the monuments, or items that have become unsightly.

title: Spring Clean Up Days at Spearfish RUS
description:
Event date: April 17, 2026
Event Time: 07:30 AM - 04:00 PM
Location:
910 Camp Comfort Road
Spearfish, SD 57783
Description:
The Spearfish Restricted Use Site (RUS) will be waiving fees for residents of the City of Spearfish and Lawrence County from 7:30 a.m. to 4 p.m. Friday, April 17, and Saturday, April 18. Household waste will not be accepted. Regular fees apply to appliances containing freon and tires without rims. Refrigerators and freezers must have the doors removed upon drop-off. Residents using a commercial vehicle for disposal of personal items are subject to regular fees. This will be at the discretion of rubble site staff. Questions can be directed to the rubble site staff at 605-645-3345 prior to disposal.

title: Spring Clean Up Days at Spearfish RUS

title: National Prescription Drug Take Back Day
description:
Event date: April 25, 2026
Event Time: 12:00 AM - 11:59 PM
Location:
225 W Illinois St.
Spearfish, SD 57783
Description:
National Prescription Drug Take Back Day
April 25
SPEARFISH, SD – It's Spring - time to CLEAN UP your medicine cabinet of unneeded meds and drop them off on National Prescription Drug Take Back Day, April 25, 10 a.m. to 2p.m., for proper disposal. There's a receptacle outside of the front door of the Spearfish Police Department, 225 W Illinois St, where you can drop off unused/expired/unneeded medications 24/7/365.

title: City of Spearfish and Spearfish Community Foundation ADA Picnic Area Ribbon Cutting
description:
Event date: April 23, 2026
Event Time: 12:00 PM - 01:00 PM
Location:
404 South Canyon Street
Spearfish, SD 57783
Description:
The City of Spearfish and the Spearfish Community Foundation are holding a ribbon-cutting ceremony to celebrate the addition of two new ADA compliant picnic tables featured at Spearfish City Park. The project funded by the Spearfish Community Foundation aims to promote the park's accessibility and inclusivity to all.
The ceremony will be held at the picnic area, just off the recreation path and adjacent to the creek. Refreshments will be available following the ceremony.
